summary: Mixed‑quality July 4 show – Jerry’s guitar is on fire, but the first set feels rushed and under‑cooked.
review: The recording captures a solid performance with Jerry Garcia delivering an incendiary opening two minutes of track 12 and a memorable guitar break on track 13. Reviewers note that the first set was hurried, likely due to Dylan’s appearance, leaving many songs without their usual improvisational space. No specific comments about the audio source were provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Two reviews give moderate to positive scores (4 and 3). The show has strong moments (Jerry’s playing) but also noticeable performance issues (rushed first set), while the recording quality is not discussed, leading to a balanced rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on soundboard vs. audience or any audio clarity issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as rushed and lacking jams due to the Dylan/Farm Aid context; second‑half highlights Jerry’s guitar work but no specific song titles are named.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Fire performance on track 12 (first two minutes) and a great guitar break on track 13.
